event: operated for treatment of right inguinal hernia 20 years ago
abdominopelvic CT showed single anatomical right kidney
renal abscess ruptured in intraperitoneal cavity
antibiotic therapy with ceftriaxone plus metronidazole for 48 hours
ECBU culture objectifying urinary tract infection due to Pseudomonas Aeruginosa
rise of right double J stent
abdominopelvic CT showed clear regression of air bubbles
double J catheter removed within six weeks
